report.executive_summary: 9 agents across 3 clusters walked through a 4-screen signup flow. Completion was strong for technical founders, mixed for PMs, and notably worse for accessibility-needs users. Compliance concerns surfaced on the consent screen.

cluster_findings.summary: One completion, one give-up, one dead-end.
One completion, one accessibility-driven give-up, one max-steps.
